text: Standing at the threshold of this glass-walled room, I am struck by how the transparent barrier separates anticipation from action. The interior space hints at creativity and innovation, as suggested by the vivid colors and the acronym 'R+D' on the far wall. I am curious, compelled by the invitation to step inside and be part of this unfolding process of discovery. This place feels like a nexus where intention meets possibility—an exhilarating, slightly tense anticipation of new ideas taking shape.
